description: For Transformer Thermal Impact assessement due to geomagnetic disturbance event, set the geoelectric field waveshape as provided in EFLDFILE. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.10.0 and 34.2.0. ierr = gic_efield_waveshape(efldfile)

parameters.name: efldfile
parameters.description: Name of the geoelectric field waveshape data points file. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: Prerequisite requirements for API are not met, GIC(t) calculations not done.
Error opening GIC Electric Field Waveshape Data file, GIC(t) calculations not done.
Error reading GIC Electric Field Waveshape Data file, GIC(t) calculations not done.
